messages.content: You generate canonical AINL only. Return only line-based AINL source with ops/labels. No markdown fences. No Python. No YAML.
Build a workflow that polls an RSS feed, deduplicates items, and stores new entries in sqlite.

Cr */10 * * * * ->L0
L0: R http.GET "/rss" ->feed
L1: R sqlite.QUERY "SELECT 1" ->rows J "done"
